nasb.text: Not so! Go now, the men among you, and serve the Lord, for that is what you desire.” So they were driven out from Pharaoh’s presence.

esv.text: No! Go, the men among you, and serve the Lord, for that is what you are asking.” And they were driven out from Pharaoh’s presence.

cnv.text: 不可以這樣，只有你們的男子可以去事奉耶和華，因為這原是你們要求的。”於是把他們從法老面前趕出去。

ccb.text: 不行！只有男子可以去事奉耶和华，这是你们一直要求的。”法老说完，便下令把他们赶出去。
